节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: This module provides the capability of manage USB device.
Connects to the USB device based on the device information returned by getDevices().
注释信息: @param { USBDevice } device - USB device on the device list returned by getDevices().
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - The parameter types do not match or parameter is not specified.
@throws { BusinessError } 14400001 - Permission denied. Need call requestRight to get permission.

parameters.说明: USB device on the device list returned by getDevices().

error_codes.description: The parameter types do not match or parameter is not specified.
Permission denied. Need call requestRight to get permission.

节点.功能描述: Checks whether the application has the permission to access the device.
注释信息: @param { string } deviceName - device name defined by USBDevice.name.
@returns { boolean } indicates if the user has the permission to access the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - The parameter types do not match or parameter is not specified.
节点.return_description: indicates if the user has the permission to access the device.

error_codes.description: The parameter types do not match or parameter is not specified.

节点.功能描述: Requests the permission for a given application to access the USB device. The system application has access to the device by default, and there is no need to call this interface to apply.
注释信息: @param { string } deviceName - device name defined by USBDevice.name.
@returns { Promise<boolean> } indicates if the device access permissions are granted.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - The parameter types do not match or parameter is not specified.
节点.return_description: indicates if the device access permissions are granted.

error_codes.description: The parameter types do not match or parameter is not specified.

节点.功能描述: Remove the permission for a given application to access the USB device. The system application has access to the device by default, and calling this interface will not have any impact.
注释信息: @param { string } deviceName - device name defined by USBDevice.name.
@returns { boolean } indicates if the device access permissions are removed.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - The parameter types do not match or parameter is not specified.
节点.return_description: indicates if the device access permissions are removed.

error_codes.description: The parameter types do not match or parameter is not specified.

节点.功能描述: Add device access permission. The system application has access to the device by default, and calling this interface will not have any impact.
注释信息: @param { string } bundleName - refers to application that require access permissions.
@param { string } deviceName - device name defined by USBDevice.name.
@returns { boolean } value to indicate whether the permission is granted.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - The parameter types do not match or parameter is not specified.

parameters.说明: refers to application that require access permissions.

节点.return_description: value to indicate whether the permission is granted.

error_codes.description: The parameter types do not match or parameter is not specified.

节点.功能描述: Converts the string descriptor of a given USB function list to a numeric mask combination.
注释信息: @param { string } funcs - descriptor of the supported function list.
@returns { number } the numeric mask combination of the function list.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - The parameter types do not match or parameter is not specified.

parameters.说明: descriptor of the supported function list.

节点.return_description: the numeric mask combination of the function list.

error_codes.description: The parameter types do not match or parameter is not specified.

节点.功能描述: Converts the numeric mask combination of a given USB function list to a string descriptor.
注释信息: @param { FunctionType } funcs - numeric mask combination of the function list.
@returns { string } - descriptor of the supported function list.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - The parameter types do not match or parameter is not specified.

parameters.说明: numeric mask combination of the function list.

节点.return_description: - descriptor of the supported function list.

error_codes.description: The parameter types do not match or parameter is not specified.

节点.功能描述: Sets the current USB function list in Device mode.
注释信息: @param { FunctionType } funcs - numeric mask combination of the supported function list.
@returns { Promise<void> } the promise returned by the function.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - The parameter types do not match or parameter is not specified.
@throws { BusinessError } 14400002 - Permission denied.The HDC is disabled by the system.

parameters.说明: numeric mask combination of the supported function list.

节点.return_description: the promise returned by the function.

error_codes.description: The parameter types do not match or parameter is not specified.
Permission denied.The HDC is disabled by the system.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the numeric mask combination for the current USB function list in Device mode.
注释信息: @returns { FunctionType } the numeric mask combination for the current USB function list in FunctionType.
节点.return_description: the numeric mask combination for the current USB function list in FunctionType.
